functions.name: paginate
functions.bug_description: Off-by-one: rejects the last valid page when item count is exactly divisible by page_size

functions.name: binary_search
functions.bug_description: Incorrect loop termination: while low < high misses the case where target is at index 0

functions.name: is_leap_year
functions.bug_description: Missing century year check: returns True for years divisible by 100 but not 400 (e.g., 1900)

functions.name: truncate_string
functions.bug_description: Off-by-one: uses >= instead of > so strings of exactly max_len are incorrectly truncated

functions.name: days_between
functions.bug_description: Missing abs(): returns negative days when date2 is before date1
